sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102980" key="tele/stwr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τελέσ-τωρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ορος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τελεστής</foreign>, as epith. of Apollo, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.525.20</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
